answer:
The alien arrived at the prison inside the escape pod that was launched from the Sulaco. A facehugger had attached to one of the crew members, and an alien later burst from inmate Spike's chest after the pod crash-landed on Fiorina 161. Bishop later confirmed that an alien came with them in the pod.

\boxed{\text{The alien came to the prison inside the escape pod from the Sulaco.}}
